script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== live claude as aixa with real prompt + captured output ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo "What is two plus two? Answer with just the number." | timeout 120 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions > /tmp/aixa_test 2>/tmp/aixa_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 500 /tmp/aixa_test; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 500 /tmp/aixa_err'
echo '=== outbound texts: most recent for each per-user (look for post-migration replies) ==='
for pair in "afrah:.afrah-bot" "aixa:.aixa-bot" "alejandro:.alejandro-bot" "axel:.axel-bot" "cameron:.cameron-bot" "emily:.emily-claude-bot" "rosi:.rosi-bot" "stephanie:.stephanie-claude-bot"; do
  u="${pair%:*}"; d="${pair#*:}"
  latest=$(tail -1 "/home/$u/$d/outbound.jsonl" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$latest" ]; then
    echo "  $u: $(echo "$latest" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; o=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(o.get("ts","?"), (o.get("text","") or "")[:80].replace(chr(10)," "))' 2>&1)"
  fi
done
echo '===END==='
